docstring:
Sample user/profile models for testing.  These aren't enabled by default in the
sandbox
Permissions used for different dashboard views.

AutoSlugField taken from django-extensions at
15d3eb305957cee4768dd86e44df1bdad341a10e
Uses Oscar's slugify function instead of Django's
